notes: parseAstroTemplate is 115 LOC with CC59 and nesting 11 inside a 207-line pure regex parser

plan.summary: Keep parseAstroTemplate and all public result types available from the existing module; move preprocessing/guards, resolution helpers, mutable tag state, and tag scanning into focused private modules.

extractions.unit: BOM/CRLF normalization, frontmatter split, size/brace guards, comment masking
line/column, expression context, framework and import resolution, slot fallback lookup
tag/section stacks and accumulated parser result state
tag regex walk and per-tag state transitions

plan.dependency_impact: astro extractor and astro-islands consume parseAstroTemplate and its type exports through the existing module path; no external consumer should import private split modules.
plan.existing_reuse: Reuse the existing regex semantics and pure parser helpers; no new parser dependency or AST behavior.
plan.test_strategy: Run the existing 25-case parser suite unchanged against the pre-refactor code, then rerun it after each extraction and verify downstream Astro extractor/island suites.

prove.findings_disposition: pre-existing parser semantics recorded for post-refactor remediation review
